title: Sussare Cibium
description: Adds vita carnis in a vanilla friendly way!
body:
JOIN OUR DISCORD TO REPORT BUGS!!!

                                                                        

JOIN OUR DISCORD TO REPORT BUGS!!!

https://discord.gg/ntw4dVZfkZ

      

Ill make a logo for this soon enough...



REQUIRES GECKOLIB

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c64eaac1013d28a6c112f706338e7249b43eb6c9.png)


Welcome to the wonderous world of Vita Carnis, in a vanilla style. We decided to do this project so you guys can have a full, fun, and high quality experience! Below will explain a bit about each mob. Try to learn from the game however, this is just a brief overview.


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f541f28809fcd03c639e7918dea4af5f2401d67_0.webp)


THE MIMIC:

The mimic is a hostile entity that rarely spawns and will stalk a player from a max distance of 64 blocks away. Be careful and always be on the lookout!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10393a84677cbe488a495456e8560735eee918db.png)

Elder Mimic: 

A stronger Mimic, but does the same thing as the mimic functionally.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06da3dbba4673b74d4ee47c9d7a68cc0a8d12ff5.png)

Host of Influence:

The Host will stay stationary, but will add to the danger of the world by dealing damage when the player gets too close.

It also drops a host spike, which can be used to give the "Influenced" effect, which for mobs will bring them to the host. In players it delivers nausea.


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8257b9e9ebff73244962aec26233cc2b9146d254.png)



Meatsnake:

The meatsnake is an entity that eats anything rotting, including undead entites!




![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a67db4bae27500ba2df960ccecb0e43cac3cd47.png)




The Monolith:

The monolith just stands there, and is extremely rare to find!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05306e2aa6dfae6fcbd6d336fb4beb5327207cd7.png)

CREDITS:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b87689f7b1136a0a61379b903cf5926116e40cba.png)
